name: O-1 seed corpus: postmortem records carry a root_cause field so they can train the H-5/H-9 lessons-learned surface
command: missing=0; for f in "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/seed/postmortems"/*.jsonl; do grep -q '"root_cause":' "$f" || missing=$((missing+1)); done; [ "$missing" -eq 0 ] && echo root_cause_present 1>&2
